zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn於大約1428年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，她的父親Llwellyn Ap Gruffydd44歲，母親Goldeubryd verch Madoc30歲。她於1457年與Rhys Ap Howell Ap Gruffudd結婚。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn于大约1428年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，她的父亲Llwellyn Ap Gruffydd44岁，母亲Goldeubryd verch Madoc30岁。她于1457年与Rhys Ap Howell Ap Gruffudd结婚。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenhwyfar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ + hwyfar ‘smooth, soft’. See also Jennifer , Guinevere .

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn was born about 1428, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Llwellyn Ap Gruffydd, was 44 and her mother, Goldeubryd verch Madoc, was 30. She married Rhys Ap Howell Ap Gruffudd in 1457.

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenhwyfar ferch Llywelyn(이)가 대략 1428년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llwellyn Ap Gruffydd(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Goldeubryd verch Madoc(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1457년 Rhys Ap Howell Ap Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다.
